titleStmt.title: SII 6.962: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 962. (A.R. No. 310-E of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Āsīdrājanyamālāmaṇimakuṭirōciṣā dīptapādō vīraśrīmannṛsiṁhakṣitipatirahitaprauḍhamānā
pama¨rddī . dhīmāṁstasyōrurājyapraṇayanacaturastallubhaṭṭastamāja stasyābhūdacyutaḥ śrīguṇagaṇanilayaḥ śrīmadannāI
nāmā . 1 nṛsiṁhacaraṇadvaṁdvastutyājani lasammanāḥ . sukṛti[¨rbha]gavatbhaktyā paripū¨rṇamanōrathaḥ . 2 śākābdē nētramātṛdyu
maṇisugaṇitē caitrikē śuklapakṣē vārē saumyasya pū¨rṇṇābhidhatithisamayē śrīnṛsiṁhasya nityaṁ . prītyā satpuṣpamā
lāṁ samayavilasitāṁ cāruṇī cāmarē dvē prādādētatpravṛttiṁ vyatanuta matimānsannibaṁdhān pradāya . 3 Abhiṣēkasya sama
yē nṛharēḥ prativāsaraṁ . paṭhituṁ pauruṣaṁ sūktamadādēkannibhaṁdhakaṁ . 4 ItthamannāImahatā sēnānyā sukṛtaṁ kṛtaṁ .
Ācaṁdratāraṁ nṛharēḥ prītyai(ṁ) pāṁtvatra vaiṣṇavāḥ . 5 śakava¨rṣaṁbhulu 1272 gunēṇṭi caitra śukla punnamayu bhudhavāramunāṁḍu
pātratallubhaṭla koḍuku AnnāImahāsēnāpatulu tamaku Āyurārōgyaiśva¨ryyābhivṛdhdhigānu tāru sama¨rppiṁcina pu
ṣpamālelu 2 nu Ubhayadhūpamaṁdu paramāṟa śrīrāmareḍḍi narasiṁhama ponnama mādisāni vīralaku peṭṭu nibhaṁdhālu 2
[A]bhiṣēkāvasaramaṁdu puruṣasūktamu caduva kēśavabhāgavatuniki peṭina nibhaṁdha 1 pratidivasamunnu tirumāla cā
tiṁpa Amaradhāsu Annisāniki nibhaṁdha 1 Īdha¨rmmānusaṁdhāta sōmādula ciṁgunāyakuniki nibhaṁdha 1 Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava
rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha[¨r*]mmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śatrussyāt dha¨rmaḥ śatru¨rnna kasyacit . śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.962 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
